harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: Orion makes eye contact with the woman

full_prompt:
Context: This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.. Film stock: 35mm film grain. Color palette: cinematic. Lighting: cinematic. Era: modern. composite_prompt: Background: The Sunnyvale Town Center Mall: a busy indoor shopping center with tile floors, populated by a diverse public demographic during the daytime., Orion - a 30 year old man with a long beard. He is contemplative and a professional
